opportunity.title: Show HN: Output.ai - OSS framework we extracted from 500+ production AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The hardest part of agent frameworks isn't the routing logic—it's handling tool response schema variance across providers. You'll need runtime validation layers that operate outside the LLM's knowledge to prevent cascading failures when one vendor changes their API format.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building multi-provider LLM agents with tool orchestration and have extracted architectural patterns from production systems.
